name: Ecovacs Robotics Co., Ltd.
summary: Ecovacs Robotics Co., Ltd. engages in research, development, design, manufacture, and sale of robotic products. Its products include DEEBOT, a floor-cleaning robot; WINBOT, a window-cleaning robot; ATMOBOT, a mobile air-purifier robot; and BENEBOT, a shopping assistance robot. The company has operations in China, Japan, Germany, the United States, Canada, the Czech Republic, France, Iran, Malaysia, Poland, Spain, Switzerland, and internationally. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Suzhou, China.
